creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:

www/drupal-textile -> www/drupal4-textile 
www/drupal-filemanager -> www/drupal4-filemanager 
www/drupal-gsitemap -> www/drupal4-gsitemap 
www/drupal-i18n -> www/drupal4-i18n
